acceptance.metric: 1. Manifest/body mesh provenance read and contract identified
acceptance.baseline: Current body_mesh_index/replay_viewer_manifest expose body_mesh_url/body_mesh_index_url/mesh_status but no per-frame trust-band field in existing frames.
acceptance.after: Viewer parses optional per-mesh-frame `trust_badge` carrying trust_band.py vocabulary (`verified | preview | low_confidence`) from body mesh index metadata and legacy body_mesh frames.
acceptance.target: Identify current provenance path and exact viewer/pipeline field contract.

acceptance.baseline: Existing artifacts have no per-frame mesh trust field and render with current solid material.
acceptance.after: Absent `trust_badge` maps to the exact same material as today; invalid present values fail parsing. Pipeline half should emit `trust_badge: "preview"` for human_review-tier mesh frames.
acceptance.target: No behavior change when field is absent; documented exact key for pipeline lane.

acceptance.baseline: All body meshes used the same solid green material.
acceptance.after: `preview` renders amber estimated translucent material with opacityScale 0.62; `low_confidence` renders gray estimated translucent material with opacityScale 0.42; neither is hidden or solid-colored.
acceptance.target: human_review-tier frames get visually distinct translucent estimated styling.

acceptance.baseline: New tests failed before implementation: material export missing and decoded trust_badge was undefined.
acceptance.after: Focused tests pass: 117 passed. Full `web/replay` verification passes: npm test 233 passed, typecheck exit 0, build exit 0.
acceptance.target: Unit tests for tier->material including absent fail-safe; existing viewer suite green.

honest_issues: No localhost/browser visual QA was run in this sandbox; the manager's post-land zoomed live browser check remains required.
BEST-STACK DELTA: expected none and actual none. This was display-only viewer styling with no runtime/default knob and no edit to `configs/racketsport/best_stack.json`.
The pipeline half still must emit per-mesh-frame `trust_badge`; current body mesh artifacts do not carry it.
next: Pipeline lane should emit `trust_badge: "preview"` on human_review-tier body mesh index frames, then manager should run the zoomed browser visual check.
